response.justification: Maria possesses a strong engineering background with highly relevant experience in geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems. However, her recent systems-level programming relies on DLang rather than the required modern C++ or Rust, meaning she would require some ramp-up time to meet the primary technology requirements of the role.
strengths: Extensive domain experience building and maintaining geospatial data platforms and web GIS applications.
Proven track record engineering low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Strong software craftsmanship practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and full-stack adaptability.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, having primarily used TypeScript and DLang over the last decade.
Her only professional C/C++ role was a brief 6-month stint in 2014-2015.
While she has strong general GIS experience, there is no direct evidence of building routing tiling or navigation guidance pipelines.
